response:
Yes, both individuals were known by multiple names or nicknames based on the provided context.

**Steve Sekely** was known by several names due to his changing professional and immigration status. Born **Székely István**, he was also known as **Stefan Szekely**.

**William King Baggot** (King Baggot) was referred to by multiple nicknames reflecting his fame during the silent film era. He was called the **"King of the Movies,"** **"The Most Photographed Man in the World,"** and **"The Man Whose Face Is As Familiar As The Man In The Moon."**
